note: Repo is a monorepo: client code lives under packages/ai-parrot/src/parrot/clients/ (the top-level parrot/clients/ holds only stale __pycache__). All paths below use the packages/ prefix.

params.question: NovaSonicClient Nova Sonic bidirectional voice client

queries.intent: Orient on the existing Nova Sonic client page and its neighbours

params.question: GoogleClient google client multimodal generation architecture

queries.intent: Orient on the Google client reference architecture
Full understanding of current NovaSonicClient: modes, fallback to Nova text, credentials, streaming
Reference architecture: how GoogleClient unifies text/audio/generation modes
Reference for the generation.py mixin/module pattern (image/video) to mirror for Canvas/Reel
How the google subpackage exports its client
Bedrock client: AWS_CREDENTIALS/aws_id credential resolution pattern to reuse
Where AWS_CREDENTIALS is defined/consumed (parrot.conf and clients)
AbstractClient contract the new NovaClient must satisfy
All usage sites of the current client (handlers, bots, factory, exports) to size the refactor blast radius
Client registration/dispatch — how NovaClient gets registered and discovered
Model catalog structures — where Nova model IDs (lite/micro/pro/premier/sonic/reel/canvas) would be declared
Existing bidirectional-stream plumbing (aws_sdk_bedrock_runtime / experimental SDK usage)
Inventory of sibling clients for naming/registration conventions
Recent activity/authors on the Sonic client
Existing test coverage for nova_sonic / bedrock / google clients
Public export surface — lazy imports, __all__, where NovaClient must be exposed
Nova model-id strings already present in the codebase (including wip nova model commit 3672eb2f4)
